description: Hand-authored (see vendor.json for why -- no prior commit exists to mine): adds isLoading: Boolean to HomeUiState, the shape of edit a real developer extending this StateFlow-backed UI state would make. Adding a field to a data class changes its ABI (copy/equals/hashCode/toString), which correctly ripples to JComposeCoGoHostActivity -- the harness's own consumer that constructs HomeUiState() directly -- so 3 classes recompile (HomeViewModel + HomeUiState from the edited file, plus the ABI-dependent HostActivity), not 1-2.
